settings.title: Settings
settings.autoLoadBooksHint: When disabled, books won't load automatically to prevent high CPU usage. You can manually start loading from the frontend.
settings.disableAutoUpdateCheckHint: When enabled, the launcher will not check GitHub Releases on startup.

updates.title: Update available
updates.statusUpToDate: You are up to date ({current}). Latest on GitHub: {latest}.
updates.statusOutdated: Your version ({current}) is outdated. Latest release: {latest}.
updates.checkFailed: Could not check for updates. Your version: {current}.
updates.checkSkipped: This build ({current}) cannot be compared to GitHub releases. Use an official release build to check for updates.

logs.title: Logs
logs.noLogs: No logs yet. Start the services to see output.

welcome.title: Welcome to Mnemoo Tools
welcome.description: Start the services to begin using Mnemoo Tools.
welcome.selectFolder: First, select your publish_files folder in settings.
